categories.label: Warriors
categories.description: Sum of bravery values on all warrior cards

categories.label: Hunters
categories.description: Points from triangular number table based on number of hunter cards

categories.label: Miners
categories.description: Value of the single highest-value miner card only

categories.label: Explorers
categories.description: Sum of bravery values on all explorer cards

categories.label: Blacksmiths
categories.description: Points from escalating table based on number of blacksmith cards

categories.label: Heroes
categories.description: Bravery values from all recruited hero cards

categories.label: Distinctions
categories.description: Bonus points from distinction cards earned at end of Age 1

categories.label: Highest Coin
categories.description: Value of your highest coin added to final score

win_condition: Player with the highest total bravery points wins. Tiebreaker: highest single coin value.
